sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96205" key="staitinokogxomagh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σταιτῐνοκογχομᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n96205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moulded into a boss of dough</tr_>, prob. cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
